interestSummary: Soumith Chintala is focused on advancing open-source AI infrastructure, emphasizing the need for coordinated human feedback sharing among open LLMs and highlighting the importance of software excellence in hardware companies like NVIDIA and Apple. He also dedicates time to staying informed through curated AI news and is involved with a new AI research and product company, Thinking Machines Lab.
